# Pvt System

**Summary**: A laboratory system used to measure the pressure, volume, and temperature (PVT) properties of reservoir fluids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-al-azani|AL-AZANI, 2019]] used a PVT system to determine the solubility and phase behavior of CO2 with various solvents.
